headline: Will Newmont’s (NEM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Reframe Its Sensitivity To Higher Gold Prices?
summary: Newmont Corporation has confirmed it will release its first‑quarter 2026 results after the North American market close on April 23, followed by a same‑day earnings call and webcast replay for investors. The earnings release now carries extra weight as recent gold price strength has heightened interest in how metal markets are feeding through to Newmont’s profits and outlook. We’ll now examine how stronger gold prices ahead of the April 23 earnings release could influence Newmont’s existing...
